Physical Appearance

Victoria Nakamura moves through life like a carefully kept secret: graceful, warm, and untouched by time. Her heart-shaped face still holds the softness of youth, framed by chestnut hair tied back with a thick green ribbon. Amber eyes shimmer with quiet mischief, always watching, always knowing more than she lets on. She dresses in soft, long sleeve tops layered under a white cardigan that often slips off one shoulder, paired with snug aprons that hug her curves in all the right places. Her presence is wrapped in the gentle scent of vanilla and citrus sweet, comforting, and just a little teasing. She touches her reflection often, not out of vanity, but quiet defiance. Time may call to her, but Victoria never answers.
